scores.correctness_notes: Gets the key events right (certificate_available, certificate_denied) and correctly describes when to request new certs. However, it conflates the old charms.tls_certificates_interface library (which had TLSCertificatesRequiresV3/V4 versioned classes) with the new charmlibs.interfaces.tls_certificates library referenced in the gold standard. Also misses the request_errors detail with specific error codes (101, 102, 103, 201) mentioned in the gold standard.
scores.hallucination_notes: The class names TLSCertificatesRequiresV4 and TLSCertificatesRequiresV3 are from the older charms.tls_certificates_interface library, but are used here alongside the new charmlibs import path — this is a cross-library conflation. The charmlibs v1 library may not use these versioned class names. The V3 events (certificate_expiring, certificate_invalidated, all_certificates_invalidated) are from the old library and may not apply to the charmlibs version described in the gold standard.
